recommendations.title: It! The Terror from Beyond Space
recommendations.overview: The first manned expedition to Mars is invaded by an unknown life form, which stows away on the rescue ship.

recommendations.title: The Wandering Earth II
recommendations.overview: Humans built huge engines on the surface of the earth to find a new home. But the road to the universe is perilous. In order to save earth, young people once again have to step forward to start a race against time for life and death.

recommendations.title: Tramps
recommendations.overview: A young man and woman find love in an unlikely place while carrying out a shady deal.

recommendations.title: The Deadly Spawn
recommendations.overview: When a meteorite touches down in the New Jersey woods carrying a monstrous alien slug, it’s up to four teens to stop it before it’s terrifying brood consumes all life on Earth!

recommendations.title: The Space Between Us
recommendations.overview: A young man raised by scientists on Mars returns to Earth to find his father.

recommendations.title: Stowaway
recommendations.overview: A three-person crew on a mission to Mars faces an impossible choice when an unplanned passenger jeopardizes the lives of everyone on board.

recommendations.title: Fascists on Mars
recommendations.overview: In 1938 a group of fascists led by the general Gaetano Maria Barbagli decides to invade the planet of Mars.

recommendations.title: Capricorn One
recommendations.overview: In order to protect the reputation of the American space program, a team of NASA administrators turn the first Mars mission into a phony Mars landing. Under threat of harm to their families the astronauts play their part in the deception on a staged

recommendations.title: Red Planet
recommendations.overview: Astronauts search for solutions to save a dying Earth by searching on Mars, only to have the mission go terribly awry.

recommendations.title: The Congress
recommendations.overview: An aging, out-of-work actress accepts one last job, though the consequences of her decision affect her in ways she didn't consider.
